name: Flaming Mangos (Kh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and peel fresh mangos, cutting each into 6 slices.
2. Place the sliced mangos in a chafing dish or skillet.
3. Pour orange juice over the fruit and sprinkle with sugar.
4. Heat to simmer gently, stirring to dissolve sugar and coat the fruit.
5. After 3 or 4 minutes, pour tequila. Keep the heat on medium.
6. Flame the sauce by pouring a small amount of tequila into a teaspoon and holding it over the flame of the chafing dish or range until it flames.
7. Use this flaming tequila to ignite the tequila poured over the mangos.
8. Serve over vanilla ice cream.
